notes: Played through first 3 levels. Everything works, including controller support.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: It gives an error "GetThreadContext failed", which is a known issue with the latest nvidia drivers with some games. add PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% as a launch option to fix it. The game runs beautifully after that, but hangs on exit and has to be closed manually.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes:
Locks up when quitting from within the game or alt+f4. Not responding dialog, easy to kill.

Controllers tested (Dualshock 4, Xbox 360); multiplayer tested; everything works great.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Performance is perfect, game starts in a window, was 1280x720 in a 1920x1080 desktop. You must complete the tutorial in order to gain access to settings to change to fullscreen. The game might start out with keyboard controls at first, so you'll have to make a katamari of 10cm to finish the tutorial. If you are using a Dualshock 4, you need to set it as an Xbox controller in either the game settings or in global steam settings, otherwise the game will not detect it.  Game typically doesn't like to be alt-tabbed, usually pauses and/or screen shrinks down to the very top-left corner which then has to be closed. The game will crash when you quit, and sometimes doesn't end all of its processes, requiring you to stop them manually, and this is usually the Unity crash reporter that is causing it. If not, find katamari.exe and end process.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Just make sure you use  Wine D3D11 and itll run perfectly, you cant change resolution till after the tutorial.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Game crashes or gets stuck when quitting and sometimes requires being killed. Dualshock 4 only works if using Xbox Steam Input profile. Otherwise runs perfectly at 1440p with maximum graphics settings.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL
